samplerKey.description: Sampler (integration method) from the unified curated framework (epic 7114, decision 2), honored by the native mlx-gen / candle-gen engines. Names match gen-core's Solver registry exactly. "default" = the engine's native sampler (no swap). Supersedes the epic-1753 diffusers vocabulary (dpmpp -> dpmpp_2m, unipc -> uni_pc, + euler_ancestral / dpmpp_sde / lcm / ddim).

schedulerKey.description: Sigma schedule from the unified curated framework (epic 7114, decision 2). Names match gen-core's Scheduler registry exactly. "default" preserves the engine's native schedule. The epic-1753 "shift" pseudo-scheduler is gone — the per-generation time shift is the orthogonal defaults.schedulerShift / advanced.schedulerShift knob, not a scheduler choice.

samplerLimits.description: Per-model sampler / scheduler capability lists used to gate Image / Video Studio dropdowns. Omit the keys entirely to disable the controls; include single-element ["default"] arrays for sealed adapters so the manifest is still self-describing.

defaults.description: Model defaults surfaced as form initial values in the studios. Sampler / scheduler defaults are read by the UI (the worker just honors whatever rides on advanced).

schedulerShift.description: Default shift value when scheduler == "shift". Typical range 1.0–6.0.

limits.description: Per-model capability lists. Sampler / scheduler arrays gate the Image / Video Studio dropdowns; omit them to hide the controls.

ui.description: Display metadata for model catalog and studio surfaces.

promptGuide.description: Static Markdown prompt guide shown near prompt entry for this model.

path.description: Web-public Markdown path, served from apps/web/public.

sources.description: Primary or supplemental source links used to write the guide.

mlx.description: macOS/Apple-Silicon MLX variant metadata (desktop only). Surfaced by the Model Manager to show MLX availability, conversion status, and the minimum unified-memory tier. Inference repos/paths are owned by the Python MlxVideoAdapter; these mirror them for catalog display.

minMemoryGb.description: Minimum unified memory (GB) to run this model on MLX. Mirrors MlxVideoAdapter.estimate_requirements peak_gb.

repo.description: Turnkey MLX repo downloaded as-is (no conversion). Omitted when requiresConversion is true.

requiresConversion.description: When true, the native checkpoint must be converted to MLX locally via a tracked model_convert job.

convertSourceRepo.description: Native checkpoint repo used as the conversion source when requiresConversion is true.

limits.description: Per-backend capability override (epic 1753). MLX-backed Wan/LTX adapters expose only ["default"]; the top-level limits.samplers/schedulers describe the torch path.

downloads.description: Download entries list alternate sources for the same model; at most one may be marked default: true. If none is marked, the first supported entry is used.

provider.description: Download provider identifier, such as huggingface.

repo.description: Provider repository or model identifier used when queueing a download.

default.description: Marks the canonical alternate used for displayed size, install path, and download jobs.

estimatedSizeBytes.description: Estimated bytes for the actual files downloaded after applying the files filter. Refresh from the provider when upstream files change.

files.description: Optional allow-list of provider file patterns included in the download.

resources.description: Named auxiliary files required by an adapter or optional post-process. Resource entries are resolved by repo/file and should be lazy-fetched only when the feature that needs them runs.
